allocations.label: Liquidity Mining & Farms
allocations.releasePolicy: A separately audited emission vault; initial weekly emissions 5,000,000 VDX, then 10% reduction per quarter.

allocations.label: Team & Advisors
allocations.releasePolicy: No liquid allocation at genesis; vesting schedule and beneficiaries require legal and governance approval.

allocations.label: Community & Airdrops
allocations.releasePolicy: Claim program or governance-approved distribution, with anti-sybil controls.

allocations.label: Private Sale
allocations.releasePolicy: No transfer until applicable legal review, investor eligibility checks, and contractual vesting are in force.

approvalRequirements: Independent contract audit completed and published
Genesis manifest signed by the approved governance multisig
All recipient addresses verified out-of-band in a recorded key ceremony
Mainnet validator keys generated in HSM or hardware wallets and never committed to source control
Testnet and staging rehearsal completed from the exact manifest
